title: cercidiphyllaceae
intro: The Cercidiphyllaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a small and ancient family consisting of deciduous trees and shrubs primarily native to East Asia, characterized by simple, alternate leaves and small, inconspicuous flowers. Cercidiphyllaceae plants are often referred to as "katsura" due to the distinctive, sweet aroma of their leaves. The family is relatively rare, with only one genus, Cercidiphyllum, and a few species.
